"Elyse!" they cried, overlapping, drowning out her thoughts.

She stumbled, tripped, and fell, the forest closing in around her.

"Elyse!" the voice screamed, and she heard it one last time before darkness took her.

The forest was silent again.

"Elyse!" she whispered, her voice echoing back at her.

She opened her eyes to find herself back at the edge of the forest, the sun setting behind the trees. No one was there. No echo.
